'''datholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aventurescence|aventurescence]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aventurescence|aventurescence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| datholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dætheleth|dætheleth]] || [[word:dæthelej|dæthelej]] || [[word:dæthelesh|dæthelesh]] || [[word:dæthele|dæthele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathotholoth|dathotholoth]] || [[word:dathotholoj|dathotholoj]] || [[word:dathotholosh|dathotholosh]] || [[word:dathotholo|dathotholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:datholoth|datholoth]] || [[word:datholoj|datholoj]] || [[word:datholosh|datholosh]] || [[word:datholo|datholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathoflofth|dathoflofth]] || [[word:dathoflofj|dathoflofj]] || [[word:dathoflofsh|dathoflofsh]] || [[word:dathoflof|dathoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:datholotho|datholotho]] || [[word:datholojo|datholojo]] || [[word:datholosho|datholosho]] || [[word:datholoko|datholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:datholoth|datholoth]] || [[word:datholoj|datholoj]] || [[word:datholosh|datholosh]] || [[word:datholo|datholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:datholothol|datholothol]] || [[word:datholojol|datholojol]] || [[word:datholoshol|datholoshol]] || [[word:datholokol|datholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:datholoothotho|datholoothotho]] || [[word:datholoojojo|datholoojojo]] || [[word:datholooshosho|datholooshosho]] || [[word:datholooko|datholooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:datholothon|datholothon]] || [[word:datholojon|datholojon]] || [[word:datholoshon|datholoshon]] || [[word:datholokon|datholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:datholothooro|datholothooro]] || [[word:datholojooro|datholojooro]] || [[word:datholoshooro|datholoshooro]] || [[word:datholokooro|datholokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
